div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 绿色：本地算力 / 本地存储

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 黄色：外部 API 算力

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 蓝色：混合编排 / 本地兜底

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
用户进入题库中心
导入 OCR 工作台

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
填写导入标题、学段、学科、年级、地区、年份
上传试卷文件，可选上传答案文件

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
必填项校验与缺失项提示
标题、学科、年级、年份、试卷文件等

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
导入任务标题查重
不允许创建同名任务

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
POST /api/import-tasks
Java 接收表单与文件

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
写入 Java 文件/任务元数据
java_storage_files、java_import_tasks

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
返回处理中导入任务
前端选中任务并进入工作台

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
历史任务列表
支持重命名、删除、选择进入工作台

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MinerU provider 解析试卷
本地 CLI；服务器可复用常驻 mineru-api

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 可选：MinerU provider 解析答案文件

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
前端轮询 GET /api/import-tasks/{taskId}
展示试卷/答案 OCR 状态

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ocr-collect
保留 Markdown、content_list、页码、块顺序、图片 assets

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
建立本卷题图库
OCR 扫描图片自动进入 imageLibrary

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
paper-structure-contract
先抽取总题数、大题声明和题号范围
过滤卷头编号和说明区

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
local-boundary-detect
题号、题型粗判、选项、小问、题图归属候选

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
anchor candidate scoring
数字锚点先评分，不直接建题
段内、范围、正文区、连续性

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
boundaryConfidence
本地边界置信度

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 本地边界高置信？

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
跳过 AI 边界确认
splitter.source=local-boundary

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
低置信才调用 AI 边界确认
按题段 chunk 并发；失败分片回退本地边界

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
本地结构校验
选项、小问、题图路径和证据回溯

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
本地边界兜底
模型未配置、超时、JSON 非法或校验失败

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
确定结构边界源
AI merged 或 local fallback

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
question-structure-build
按 OCR 原文切片生成题目结构

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
sub-question-split
大题内小问写入 subQuestions/children

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
选择题/空位题结构保护
选项边界、____ 占位、题图回收

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
visual-repair
题目 crop、横线检测、可选 Pix2Text

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
本地公式标准化与校验
math_normalizer.py 多轮修复与风险标记

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
确定性 LaTeX 分隔符修复
展示公式嵌套 $ / 行内公式被运算符切断

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OCR_AUTO_SEMANTIC_REPAIR_MODE

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
默认 skip
只记录候选数量，不阻塞导入

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
inline 模式：外部 API 语义 OCR 修复
仅处理高置信风险，失败不写回

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
题目元数据补全
答案 OCR 上下文是否可用？

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
外部 API：补全题型、答案、解析、知识点、难度、分值
按 subQuestions 归属答案/解析

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
本地默认元数据
答案/解析/知识点为空，难度 medium

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
生成导入题目
状态：待校验，保留 images、options、subQuestions

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OCR_AUTO_STANDARDIZE_MODE
off / risky / all

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
首次返回前自动标准化
只处理低置信或全部题目；支持并发
不创建 Java AI job

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
硬校验后才写回
渲染、严重风险、选项、题图、小问结构

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
写入 autoStandardize 元数据
失败或阻断时保留原题

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OCR outputs
splitter、boundaryConfidence、autoSemanticRepair、llmMetrics

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
小问结构归一化
children 与 subQuestions 双字段
父题答案/解析为空

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
前端工作台展示
左侧原文件预览，右侧复合校验

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
布局解析框开关
叠加 PaperLayoutCapability 父题范围框
只读定位，不影响题目识别

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
布局框绑定
sourceEvidence + middle bbox
提取嵌套图片路径，跳过短选项标签

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
布局低置信兜底
只命中小标签/极小框/缺题图时走几何兜底或 warning

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
点击范围框
滚动并高亮右侧父题校验卡

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
工作台工具栏
重新 OCR 扫描 / AI 解析全部 / 批量入库

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
重新 OCR 扫描确认
只扫描原始试卷/答案文件
不覆盖已提取和已编辑题目

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POST /api/import-tasks/{taskId}/rescan
Java 判断处理中状态；重复触发返回 409

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI 解析全部确认
默认只补缺失解析；可勾选覆盖已有解析

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
批量 AI 解析编排
普通题整题，小问逐个；进度 n/m
失败不中断，结束汇总

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
题图引用与题图库
images 保存元数据；题干 Markdown 引用决定预览位置

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
选择/上传题图
新增题图自动补引用；手动删除引用后不再渲染该图

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
知识点库联动选择
GET /api/knowledge-points，本地筛选搜索

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
复合编辑器
大题题干 + 小问题干/答案/解析/分值/知识点

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI 标准化：本地确定性修复
LaTeX 分隔符、块公式边界、严重风险检测

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI 标准化：可信 OCR 兜底
rawOcrContext 与当前编辑稿分离

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI 标准化：缓存命中或可选 LLM 修复
AI_STANDARDIZE_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
候选安全闸门
renderValidation / applyBlocked / candidateSevereIssues

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
候选面板
区分本地修复、原始 OCR 兜底、AI 修复
不可应用候选禁用应用

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
外部 API：AI 解析
有效题图进入多模态上下文
含小问时返回 subQuestions 解析

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
题目入库查重
重复题目跳过或拒绝

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
单题/批量入库
写入 bankQuestions，保留 subQuestions

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
题库中心复合编辑
大题题干 + 小问答案/解析 + AI 操作

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
组卷中心按小问选择
subSelections 只保存在试卷层

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
组卷中心引用题目
仅渲染所选小问，导出 DOCX/PDF

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 题库中心可搜索、编辑、组卷引用
